label: Stat part (resting)
description: Scales the stat by a factor when the pawn is currently resting in a bed.

Class.label: Class
Class.description: C# StatPart type used by RimWorld DirectXmlLoader for this list item.

priority.label: Priority
priority.description: Sort order among stat parts. Higher values execute later.

factor.label: Factor
factor.description: Stat multiplier applied when the pawn is resting.
